drills.name: Speed-precision balance drill
drills.description: Cut practice circles at progressively faster speeds while maintaining zero deviations, targeting sub-45 second completion times.
drills.targets_weakness: Completion time optimization for advanced level.

drills.name: Traction-angle practice
drills.description: Focus on minimal traction repositioning by optimizing Maryland placement angles to maintain cutting efficiency throughout the circle.

progression_note: At the advanced level, focus on approaching the 30-40 second benchmark while maintaining your excellent precision. Your technique is solid - now optimize for speed without sacrificing accuracy.
